hadith-eng: Hamnah bint Jahsh narrated:"I had a case of blood flow that was severe and excessive. So I went to the Prophet to inform him and ask him about it. Then delay Maghrib and hasten Isha, then perform Ghusl and combine the two prayers. So do this (if you are able). Then perform Ghusl with the dawn and pray.
